name: io.github.ericlovold/sanction
title: Sanction
description: Authorize an AI agent's spend & credential use before it acts — budgets, encrypted vault, audit.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent API key (pxy_...). Create one at https://getsanction.com or via POST /api/v1/wallets then POST /api/v1/agents.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTION_WALLET_ID
environmentVariables.description: Wallet id, used by the sanction_wallet_status tool.
